title: Pink Foxes
body:
**Pink Foxes is a simple pink recolor of the regular fox and arctic fox.**

This is a pack I've been keeping up to date pretty much out of tradition at this point since it used to be one of the earliest packs I've ever made. The newest versions now have baby foxes and spawn eggs and slightly overhauled color palettes.

**Features affected by this pack:**
- Fox
- Arctic Fox
- Fox Spawn Egg
